title: July 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 8''' is the 189th day of the year (190th in leap years). There are 176 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Stan Woch]] is born.
*[[1979]] – ''[[The Constancia Affair]]'' ends its publishing run.
*[[2015]] – [[Lando 1|''Lando'' 1]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 7|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 7]] published in Germany.
*[[2017]] – "[[The Imposter Inside]]" premieres on YouTube.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 6|''Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge'' - Episode 6]] premieres on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids YouTube channel]].
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Ewoks (trade paperback)]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Knitting the Galaxy]]'' reprinted in paperback.
<noinclude>
